memoryArtifacts.headline: Henry KILHAM
memoryArtifacts.description: Henry KILHAM (1558 – 1631) was baptized on 10 Aug 1558 in St James, Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England. This church was largely rebuilt, starting in 1503, with more alterations in the 18th and 19th ce …

zh.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Kilham於1558年8月10日出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親William Kilham28歲，母親Elizabeth H. Clements22歲。他於1582年8月12日與Alice Goodale在英國素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年5月21日在英國素福爾可丹寧頓享年72歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可丹寧頓。

zh-hans.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Kilham于1558年8月10日出生在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲William Kilham28岁，母亲Elizabeth H. Clements22岁。他于1582年8月12日与Alice Goodale在英国素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1631年5月21日在英国素福爾可丹寧頓享年72岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可丹寧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kilham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kilham (ER Yorks), Kilham in Cantley (WR Yorks), or Kilham in Kirknewton (Northumb).

variants.name: Killham
meanings: English: from any of several places in northern England called Kilham, most of which are recorded as Killum in medieval documents, from an Old English prepositional phrase meaning ‘at the kilns’.

variants.name: Killam
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Kilham was born on 10 August 1558, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, his father, William Kilham, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth H. Clements, was 22. He married Alice Goodale on 12 August 1582, in Dennington, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 May 1631, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dennington, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Kilham est né le 10 août 1558, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Kilham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth H. Clements, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Goodale le 12 août 1582, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mai 1631, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Kilham am 10. August 1558 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Kilham 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth H. Clements 22. Er hat am 12. August 1582 in Dennington, Suffolk, England Alice Goodale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Mai 1631 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Dennington, Suffolk, England und wurde in Dennington, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Kilham è nato il il 10 agosto 1558 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Kilham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth H. Clements, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Goodale il 12 agosto 1582, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1631, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Dennington, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Kilhamが1558年8月10日にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父William Kilhamは28歳，母Elizabeth H. Clementsは22歳であった。1582年8月12日にイギリススフォルクデニントンでAlice Goodaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年5月21日にイギリススフォルクデニントンで72歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクデニントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Kilham(이)가 1558년 8월 10일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kilham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth H. Clements(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1582년 8월 12일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Alice Goodale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 5월 21일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에 묻혔다.

pt.10 August 1558–21 May 1631: 10 de agosto de 1558–21 de maio de 1631
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Kilham nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1558, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Kilham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth H. Clements, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Goodale em 12 de agosto de 1582, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de maio de 1631, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Kilham родился 10 августа 1558 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Kilham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth H. Clements, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Goodale 12 августа 1582 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 мая 1631 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия.

es.10 August 1558–21 May 1631: 10 de agosto de 1558–21 de mayo de 1631
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Kilham nació el 10 de agosto de 1558, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Kilham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth H. Clements, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Goodale el 12 de agosto de 1582, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1631, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
